name: NVIDIA Certified Professional — Generative AI LLMs

domains.name: Model Optimization
domains.focus: Quantization (INT8/FP16/FP8/INT4), pruning, distillation, TensorRT-LLM, dynamic batching, KV cache, latency/throughput trade-offs.

domains.name: GPU Acceleration and Optimization
domains.focus: Data/tensor/pipeline/expert parallelism, FSDP, NCCL, gradient checkpointing, Nsight profiling, multi-GPU memory layout.

domains.name: Prompt Engineering
domains.focus: Zero/few-shot, chain-of-thought, RAG prompt structuring, instruction tuning, hallucination control, system-prompt design.

domains.name: Fine-Tuning
domains.focus: SFT vs PEFT (LoRA, QLoRA, adapters), RLHF/DPO/GRPO, KL-divergence in PPO, catastrophic forgetting, rank/alpha tuning.

domains.name: Data Preparation
domains.focus: Tokenizer training, vocabulary, deduplication, quality filtering, bias mitigation, data mixing ratios.

domains.name: Model Deployment
domains.focus: NIM microservices, Triton, dynamic batching, canary/A-B, autoscaling, batch vs streaming, ONNX.

domains.name: Evaluation
domains.focus: Perplexity, BLEU, ROUGE, BERTScore, RAG faithfulness, LLM-as-judge bias, human eval design.

domains.name: Production Monitoring and Reliability
domains.focus: Drift detection, observability, SLA, cost optimization, failover, quality regression alarms.

domains.name: LLM Architecture
domains.focus: Multi-head/multi-query/grouped-query attention, RoPE/ALiBi, MoE, scaling laws, decoder-only vs encoder-decoder.

domains.name: Safety, Ethics, and Compliance
domains.focus: Bias detection, NeMo Guardrails, content filtering, prompt-injection defense, red-teaming, PII handling.
